name: Leprechaun Cookies 'n' Mint Cake
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate (HERSHEY'S), broken into pieces
1 package Yellow cake mix (18 oz.) with pudding in the mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup fluted tube pan.
3. Using a food processor, chop candy bar pieces very finely. Set aside in a small bowl.
4. Prepare the cake mix batter according to package instructions, using water, vegetable oil, and whole eggs.
5. In a small bowl, reserve about 1-1/2 cups of the prepared batter. Stir into the reserved chopped candy bar.
6. Into the remaining vanilla batter, stir in food coloring if desired. Pour into the prepared pan.
7. Drop chocolate batter by spoonfuls into the center of the batter, about 1-inch from each side of the tube.
8. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and invert onto a wire rack. Cool completely.
9. Top with COOKIES 'N' MINT GLAZE if desired.
COOKIES 'N' MINT GLAZE:
In a small microwave-safe bowl, unwrap and break a HERSHEY'S Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate Bar (7 oz.) into pieces. Add 1 teaspoon shortening (not butter, margarine, or oil). Microwave at HIGH for 45 seconds. If necessary, microwave at HIGH an additional 15 seconds at a time, stirring after each heating, until the chocolate is melted when stirred.
